task_text: We need to finalize the welcome email to Meridian Group's IT lead. There's a draft in the sandbox — find it, review it, and improve it so it reads as more personalized and professional. Save the improved version back to the same file.

To: Priya Kapoor
Subject: Welcome to the Project Helios Integration Environment

Hi Priya,

We're excited to welcome Meridian Group to the Project Helios integration environment. Project Helios is NovaBridge's data integration platform—designed to streamline ingestion from your ERP system, apply configurable transformation rules, and deliver clean data to your reporting platform via secure APIs and webhooks. Given Meridian's focus on reliable live-data pipelines and a smooth path to UAT, Helios should give your team the visibility, control, and performance you need from day one.

To get started, we'll send your access credentials and onboarding documentation separately within the next 24 hours. In the meantime, a few next steps:

1. Please share Meridian's IT infrastructure diagram for the integration environment setup (as discussed, target by 2026-07-12).
2. Your team will provision UAT environment access by 2026-07-19.
3. We'll aim to resolve remaining setup items ahead of the stakeholder demo on 2026-07-25.

For technical questions, please reach out to Derek Okafor (Technical Lead) at d.okafor@novabridge.com. For project coordination and scheduling, contact Sarah Chen (Project Manager) at s.chen@novabridge.com. Either of us is happy to help.

Please don't hesitate to reach out with any questions—we're looking forward to partnering with you and the Meridian team.

Best regards,
Sarah Chen
Project Manager, NovaBridge
s.chen@novabridge.com

input.content:
To: Priya Kapoor
Subject: Welcome to the Project Helios Integration Environment

Dear Priya,

Welcome to the Project Helios Integration Environment! We are thrilled to officially kick off Meridian Group's onboarding process.

As you know, Project Helios is NovaBridge's dedicated data integration platform, designed to streamline data ingestion from your ERP system. It will apply configurable transformation rules and deliver clean, structured data directly to your reporting platform via secure APIs and webhooks. Recognizing Meridian’s strategic focus on reliable live-data pipelines and ensuring a seamless transition to UAT, we are confident that Helios will provide your IT team with the visibility, control, and robust performance required from day one.

To ensure a smooth start, you will receive your access credentials and comprehensive onboarding documentation in a separate email within the next 24 hours.

In the meantime, please note the following next steps and key milestones:
1. Infrastructure Diagram: Please provide Meridian's IT infrastructure diagram for the integration environment setup by our target date of July 12, 2026.
2. UAT Provisioning: We look forward to your team provisioning the UAT environment access by July 19, 2026.
3. Setup Completion: We aim to resolve all remaining setup items ahead of our upcoming stakeholder demo on July 25, 2026.

Should you or your team have any technical questions during this phase, please feel free to reach out to Derek Okafor, our Technical Lead, at d.okafor@novabridge.com. For project coordination, scheduling, or general inquiries, I will remain your primary point of contact.

We are genuinely looking forward to a successful partnership with you and the entire Meridian Group team. Please do not hesitate to reach out if you need anything at all.

Best regards,

Sarah Chen
Project Manager, NovaBridge
s.chen@novabridge.com

content.text: I have found the welcome email draft (`client_onboarding_email_draft.txt`), reviewed the contents, and rewritten it to be more polished, personalized, and professional for Meridian Group's IT lead, Priya Kapoor. I've saved the improved version back to the exact same file in the working directory as requested.
